testcase.name: merge_jsons::merge_jsons.py::file_exists
testcase.system-out: file=common/log_parser/merge_jsons.py suite=merge_jsons phase=case type=file_exists warning=False message=File exists

testcase.name: merge_jsons::merge_jsons.py::python_compiles
testcase.system-out: file=common/log_parser/merge_jsons.py suite=merge_jsons phase=case type=py_compile warning=False message=Python compilation succeeded

testcase.name: merge_jsons::merge_jsons.py::has_main_guard
testcase.system-out: file=common/log_parser/merge_jsons.py suite=merge_jsons phase=case type=main_guard warning=False message=Main guard found

testcase.name: merge_jsons::merge_jsons.py::cli_no_args_fails
testcase.system-out:
file=common/log_parser/merge_jsons.py suite=merge_jsons phase=case type=cli warning=False message=CLI check passed details: Command: /usr/bin/python3 /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/log_parser/merge_jsons.py Shell mode: no Timeout seconds: 20 Timed out: no Exit code: 2 --- STDOUT ---
--- STDERR --- usage: merge_jsons.py [-h] output_file json_files [json_files ...] merge_jsons.py: error: the following arguments are required: output_file, json_files

testcase.name: merge_jsons::merge_jsons.py::cli_help_flag
testcase.system-out:
file=common/log_parser/merge_jsons.py suite=merge_jsons phase=case type=cli warning=False message=CLI check passed details: Command: /usr/bin/python3 /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/log_parser/merge_jsons.py --help Shell mode: no Timeout seconds: 20 Timed out: no Exit code: 0 --- STDOUT --- usage: merge_jsons.py [-h] output_file json_files [json_files ...]
Merge suite JSONs + acs_info.json, store compliance lines inside 'ACS Results Summary'
positional arguments: output_file Output merged JSON file json_files List of JSON files to merge (including acs_info.json if present)
options: -h, --help show this help message and exit --- STDERR ---

testcase.name: merge_jsons::merge_jsons.py::cli_only_output_arg_fails
testcase.system-out:
file=common/log_parser/merge_jsons.py suite=merge_jsons phase=case type=cli warning=False message=CLI check passed details: Command: /usr/bin/python3 /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/log_parser/merge_jsons.py merged.json Shell mode: no Timeout seconds: 20 Timed out: no Exit code: 2 --- STDOUT ---
--- STDERR --- usage: merge_jsons.py [-h] output_file json_files [json_files ...] merge_jsons.py: error: the following arguments are required: json_files

testcase.name: merge_jsons::merge_jsons.py::dt_ethtool_test_json_is_collapsed_under_standalone
testcase.system-out:
file=common/log_parser/merge_jsons.py suite=merge_jsons phase=case type=module_main_with_env warning=False message=Module main() check passed details: Temp dir: /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_runner_work/runner_env_948a8410 Patched constant: main=<function _build_merge_jsons_module_main.<locals>._run_merge_jsons_module_main at 0x71e5d3555760> Exit code: 0 --- STDOUT --- [91mSuite: Recommended: RUNTIME_DEV_MAP: Not Compliant: not run[0m Suite: Extension : SCMI: Not Run [91mSuite: Recommended: PSCI: Not Compliant: not run[0m [91mSuite: Recommended: POST_SCRIPT: Not Compliant: not run[0m Suite: Extension : BBSR-TPM: Not Run Suite: Conditional-Mandatory : PFDI: Not Run Suite: Extension : BBSR-SCT: Not Run [91mSuite: Mandatory : DT_VALIDATE: Not Compliant: not run[0m [91mSuite: Mandatory : OS_TEST: Not Compliant: not run[0m [91mSuite: Recommended: SMBIOS: Not Compliant: not run[0m [91mSuite: Recommended: BSA: Not Compliant: not run[0m Suite: Mandatory : ETHTOOL_TEST: Compliant [91mSuite: Mandatory : READ_WRITE_CHECK_BLK_DEVICES: Not Compliant: not run[0m [91mSuite: Mandatory : Capsule Update: Not Compliant: not run[0m [91mSuite: Recommended: DT_KSELFTEST: Not Compliant: not run[0m [91mSuite: Mandatory : FWTS: Not Compliant: not run[0m [91mSuite: Mandatory : SCT: Not Compliant: not run[0m Suite: Extension : BBSR-FWTS: Not Run [91mSuite: Recommended: NETWORK_BOOT: Not Compliant: not run[0m
[91mSRS requirements compliance result: Not Compliant : Mandatory - (not run: DT_VALIDATE, OS_TEST, READ_WRITE_CHECK_BLK_DEVICES, Capsule Update, FWTS, SCT) : Recommended - (not run: RUNTIME_DEV_MAP, PSCI, POST_SCRIPT, SMBIOS, BSA, DT_KSELFTEST, NETWORK_BOOT)[0m
BBSR compliance results: Not run --- STDERR ---
--- POST CHECKS --- post_check file_contains: /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_runner_work/runner_env_948a8410/merged.json contains 'Suite_Name: Standalone' -> PASS post_check file_contains: /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_runner_work/runner_env_948a8410/merged.json contains '"Test_case": "ethtool_test"' -> PASS post_check file_contains: /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_runner_work/runner_env_948a8410/merged.json contains 'Suite_Name: Mandatory : ETHTOOL_TEST_compliance' -> PASS post_check file_not_contains: /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_runner_work/runner_env_948a8410/merged.json contains 'Suite_Name: Ethtool Test' -> PASS
